hero.title: Hi, I'm Jose Gonzalez
hero.subtitle: Welcome to my portfolio. I hope you find something interesting here that can help you. I invite you to explore this space and find useful information about my career and experience as a web developer. Have a great day!
experience.title: Work Experience
about.title: About me
about.bio1: My name is Jose Miguel, but they call me Miguel or Jose. I am 28 years old, I live in Colombia but I am from Venezuela, I currently work as a Frontend Developer at Agrimanager S.A.S.
about.bio2: I consider myself a responsible, kind and committed person. I like playing guitar and listening to music from time to time and playing video games like LOL, CS:GO and World of Warcraft.
about.bio3: At university, I obtained my degree as a Higher Technical Technician (TSU) in Computer Science, taking my first steps in web programming and later specializing in software development.
projects.title: Projects
meta.description: Discover the portfolio of Jose Gonzalez, a talented Full Stack web developer with experience in modern technologies like React, Next.js, Node.js, and more.
exp_frontend_desc: Development of user interfaces using React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS and Typescript.
exp_ta_desc: Student coordination, exercise assistance and pair programming.
exp_tech_desc: Repair and maintenance of computers and mobile devices.
exp_it_desc: Network configuration and administration, Java application development.
proj_portfolio_desc: Portfolio for Manuel Blanco, a talented Full Stack web developer.
proj_inventario_desc: Inventory management system with React and Express.
proj_ecommerce_desc: REST API for E-commerce with NestJS, TypeORM and TypeScript.
